name: Jebel Jais - PJAMM Cycling
snippet:
Jebel Jais is the highest mountain in the UAE and is the highest point one can ride on a bike in this region. Ride from 315 meters to the finish.
About 500 meters before getting to the zip line station there is a big parking lot. You have to turn left there. Provisions: For a great meal and excellent view ... Missing: coordinates | Show results with: coordinates

name: Jebel Jais • Ras Al Khaimah, United Arab Emirates • Climb - MyCols
snippet: The Jebel Jais is a climb with a length of 18.9 kilometer. This is a category 1 climb. It is located in Ras Al Khaimah, Ras al Khaimah, United Arab Emirates.

name: Jebel Jais - Wikipedia
snippet: Jebel Jais is a mountain of the North-Western Hajar range in the Musandam Governorate of Oman and also in Ras Al Khaimah, United Arab Emirates.
